card_title: ChatGPT starts as a public threshold

card_role: Frames system cards and model cards as disclosure-and-warning artifacts rather than certificates of safety.

card_title: The repo turns openness into chores

card_title: GPT-4.1 is launch language, not a ruler

card_title: Blueprint is not a built factory
